kw.name: Open Browser and Navigate to Sauce Demo
Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Fail
kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Landed on Sauce Demo Page Successfully
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Landed on Sauce Demo Page Successfully
Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Run Keyword And Return Status
Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: process logout and back to landing page
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.arg: error=hamburg menu not visible on page
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.arg: error=product list menu not visible in option
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Element Text Should Be
kw.doc: Verifies that element ``locator`` contains exact the text ``expected``.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

Select From List By Value
kw.msg: Selecting options from selection list 'xpath=//select[@data-test="product-sort-container"]' by value az.
kw.doc: Selects options from selection list ``locator`` by ``values``.

kw.doc: Returns values of selected options from selection list ``locator``.

kw.name: Get From List
kw.doc: Returns the value specified with an ``index`` from ``list``.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: Copy List
kw.msg: @{expectedList} = [ Sauce Labs Backpack | Sauce Labs Bike Light | Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt | Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket | Sauce Labs Onesie | Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red) ]
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.name: Sort List
kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Lists Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if given lists are unequal.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.msg: @{expectedList} = [ Test.allTheThings() T-Shirt (Red) | Sauce Labs Onesie | Sauce Labs Fleece Jacket | Sauce Labs Bolt T-Shirt | Sauce Labs Bike Light | Sauce Labs Backpack ]
kw.doc: Returns a copy of the given list.

kw.doc: Sorts the given list in place.

kw.name: Reverse List
kw.doc: Reverses the given list in place.

Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Strings
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to strings.

kw.name: When User Add To Cart by Product Name
Convert To Lower Case
kw.doc: Converts string to lower case.

kw.name: Replace String
kw.doc: Replaces ``search_for`` in the given ``string`` with ``replace_with``.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Catenate
kw.doc: Catenates the given items together and returns the resulted string.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

Element Should Be Visible
kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is visible.
Runs the specified keyword and returns the status as a Boolean value.

kw.doc: Scrolls the element identified by ``locator`` into view.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.doc: Verifies that the element identified by ``locator`` is NOT visible.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

errors.msg: Error in file '/Users/vickyanaruslina/Documents/fachri-portofolio-qa/Automation Testing/Robot Framework/Sauce Demo/resources/keywords/loginStep.robot' on line 2: Suite 'Login & Product.Product' has already imported library 'SeleniumLibrary' with different arguments. This import is ignored.
